items.title: S&P 500 Hits New All-Time High Amid Tech Rally
items.summary: The S&P 500 reached record levels as technology stocks led the broader market higher.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $68K on Institutional Demand
items.summary: Bitcoin prices climbed as major institutional investors increased their crypto allocations.

items.title: Fed Signals Potential Rate Cut in Q3 2026
items.summary: Federal Reserve officials hinted at possible rate reductions as inflation continues to moderate.

items.title: NVIDIA Reports Record Revenue Driven by AI Chip Demand
items.summary: NVIDIA exceeded analyst expectations with record quarterly revenue fueled by data center growth.

items.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Ecosystem Reaches $50B TVL
items.summary: The total value locked in Ethereum L2 solutions has surpassed $50 billion for the first time.

items.title: Global GDP Growth Forecast Revised Upward
items.summary: The IMF has raised its global growth projection for 2026, citing resilient consumer spending.
